title: dryopteris wigmanii
intro: Dryopteris wigmanii is a species of fern native to the Andes mountains in South America. It is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, due to its ability to reduce inflammation and improve circulation. Dryopteris wigmanii is traditionally prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the leaves in hot water, and it can also be used as a tincture or added to creams and ointments for topical applications.
